records.question: Which teams named Columbus Crew have a player called Chung Hong (717) who played exactly 1 year in 2011 with singles, doubles, and total win-loss all 0–0, played as a Midfielder in the match season, and had a draft pick number of at least 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.doubles_wl = '0–0' AND player.player = 'Chung Hong (717)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–0' AND match_season.position = 'Midfielder' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)' AND match_season.draft_pick_number >= 18 AND player.total_wl = '0–0' AND team.name = 'Columbus Crew'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT team.Team_id 
FROM team 
JOIN player ON team.Team_id = player.Team 
JOIN match_season ON player.Player_ID = match_season.Player 
WHERE team.Name = 'Columbus Crew' 
AND player.Player_ID = 717 
AND player.Years_Played = '1' 
AND match_season.Season = 2011 
AND player.Singles_WL = '0–0' 
AND player.Doubles_WL = '0–0' 
AND player.Total_WL = '0–0' 
AND match_season.Position = 'Midfielder' 
AND match_season.Draft_Pick_Number >= 18

records.question: Which teams have draft pick numbers of at least 4 in seasons played where the country is exactly Isle of Man?

JOIN country c ON ms.Country = c.Country_id

JOIN player ON match_season.Player = player.Player
JOIN team ON match_season.Team = team.Team_id
WHERE match_season.Draft_Pick_Number = 18 AND player.Doubles_WL = '0–0'

records.question: Which teams named Berneice Hand include the player Bae Nam-Ju who played exactly 2 years (1988, 1990), with total wins-losses exactly 1–3, singles wins-losses exactly 0–2, and doubles wins-losses exactly 1–1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.total_wl = '1–3' AND team.name = 'Berneice Hand' AND player.years_played = '2 (1988, 1990)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–2' AND player.player = 'Bae Nam-Ju' AND player.doubles_wl = '1–1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT team.Team_id 
FROM team 
JOIN player ON team.Team_id = player.Team 
WHERE team.Name = 'Berneice Hand' 
AND player.Player = 'Bae Nam-Ju' 
AND player.Years_Played = '1988, 1990' 
AND player.Total_WL = '1–3' 
AND player.Singles_WL = '0–2' 
AND player.Doubles_WL = '1–1'

records.question: Which teams have players from Florida International who were part of the 1996 MLS College Draft?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
WHERE match_season.college = 'Florida International' AND match_season.draft_class = '1996 MLS College Draft'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT team.Team_id 
FROM match_season 
JOIN player ON match_season.Player = player.Player 
WHERE player.Team IN (SELECT Team_id FROM team) 
AND match_season.Draft_Class = '1996' 
AND match_season.College = 'Florida International'

records.question: What teams have players drafted exactly 4th in the 2000 MLS SuperDraft who played as Defenders for UCLA and are from countries where the capital is Douglas and the official native language is English Manx?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE match_season.draft_pick_number = 4 AND country.capital = 'Douglas' AND match_season.position = 'Defender' AND country.official_native_language = 'English Manx' AND match_season.college = 'UCLA' AND match_season.draft_class = '2000 MLS SuperDraft'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
JOIN match_season ms ON t.Team_id = ms.Team
JOIN player p ON t.Team_id = p.Team
JOIN country c ON ms.Country = c.Country_id
WHERE ms.Draft_Pick_Number = 4
  AND ms.Season = 2000
  AND p.Years_Played LIKE '%UCLA%'
  AND ms.Position = 'Defender'
  AND c.Capital = 'Douglas'
  AND c.Official_native_language = 'English Manx'

records.question: What teams have players who played exactly 3 years (2005, 2007–2008) and participated in seasons where the college is Florida International?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE match_season.college = 'Florida International' AND player.years_played = '3 (2005, 2007–2008)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Team_id
FROM team t
JOIN player p ON t.Team_id = p.Team
JOIN match_season ms ON p.Player_ID = ms.Player
WHERE p.Years_Played = '3'
AND ms.College = 'Florida International'

records.question: Which teams have players who played exactly 1 (2011) and where the team name is Columbus Crew?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE team.name = 'Columbus Crew' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT team.Team_id 
FROM team 
JOIN player ON team.Team_id = player.Team 
JOIN match_season ON player.Player_ID = match_season.Player 
WHERE match_season.Season = 2011 AND team.Name = 'Columbus Crew' 
GROUP BY team.Team_id 
HAVING COUNT(player.Player_ID) = 1
